creator: rotkaps_spam_trap@gmx.de
text:
Start kmplayer works fine. Close kmplayer works fine. But if watch a movie or
listen one mp3 -> kmplayer crashes. It crashes all time. the backtrace is
always the same (except the first two lines). It does not make a diference, to
klick one moviefile (or soundfile) in konquerror, or to use the "open..."
dialog in kmplayer. unbelivable: I did no changes on my system. One second I
was watching a movie. the next movie crashes the application. Since the moment
it crashes all times (with the same backtrace, see below).

By The Way: the commandline mplayer works!

Backtrace:
